describe.title: Describe questions
describe.descriptor: What picture should the reader have in their mind?
steps: Have I used precise details?
Have I avoided vague words?
Have I used evidence from the text?
Have I said the overall impression?

explain.title: Explain questions
explain.descriptor: Can you make this idea clear using reasons and evidence from the text?
steps: Have I made my point clear?
Have I used evidence?
Have I explained the evidence?
Have I linked back to the question?

infer.title: Infer questions
infer.descriptor: What can you work out even though the writer has not said it directly?
steps: Have I said what I worked out?
Have I used a clue?
Have I explained the clue?
Have I avoided wild guessing?

retrieve.title: Retrieve questions
retrieve.descriptor: Can you find the exact detail and answer accurately?
steps: Have I found the answer in the text?
Have I answered exactly what was asked?
Have I kept it short and accurate?
Have I avoided adding guesses?

why.title: Why questions
why.descriptor: What made this happen? Why did the character do this? Or why did the writer choose this?
steps: Have I used because or to?
Have I given a real reason?
Have I used a clue from the text?
Have I linked back to the question?
